narrative:
Sardinia Village (precinct in Brown County) has 641 registered voters, with 67.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
